name: STANDARDS-URLS registry: aggregator merges operator-edited STANDARDS-URLS.yaml entries with plugin-shipped standards/sources.yaml (operator entries take precedence on id collision)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: google-tsguide
  name: Operator Override
  url: https://operator.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: hourly
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/sources.yaml" --operator "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml" --emit "$PWD/merged.yaml" && grep "Operator Override" merged.yaml 1>&2 && grep "fetch_frequency: hourly" merged.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
